title: rubus australis
intro: Rubus australis, also known as the Tasmanian raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. The leaves and stems of this plant contain medicinal properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including inflammation and infections. The plant's health benefits include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer. Rubus australis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to support overall health and well-being.
